title: Error importing minifaker French locale in Code node
symptom: When trying to import the French locale of minifaker in a Code node, an error occurs indicating that the module cannot be found.
applies_when: Trying to import 'minifaker/locales/fr' in a Code node
not_this_if: The import works without specifying the locale
Using a different locale or library
root_cause: The Code node in n8n restricts access to external modules unless explicitly allowed. By default, only the main module is permitted, so additional locales need to be specified in the environment variable.
fix_steps: Add 'minifaker/locales/fr' to the existing value, separated by a comma
Restart n8n to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Update the NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_EXTERNAL variable to include 'minifaker/locales/fr' and restart n8n.
